response.justification: Maria Rodriguez has extensive experience in software development, leadership, and open-source contributions, aligning well with the role's requirements. However, her background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile development (JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js) and lacks demonstrated expertise in C++ (8+ years required) or large-scale distributed systems/cloud architecture, which are critical for this role. Her leadership experience is evident but not specifically in cloud/DevOps engineering.
strengths: Strong leadership and mentorship experience through workshops, courses, and open-source projects
Proven ability to drive technical projects to completion, including GISCollective (Kubernetes-based platform)
Diverse technical stack and problem-solving skills across multiple domains (embedded, web, mobile, AI agents)
concerns: No explicit 8+ years of C++ experience (primary experience in JavaScript/TypeScript, D, Java)
Limited demonstrated experience with cloud architecture or distributed systems at scale
Resume lacks direct experience with cloud compute technologies or hardware architecture
